metadata.title: UK EOR Services - Employer of Record United Kingdom
metadata.description: UK EOR and Employer of Record United Kingdom services. Hire employees in the UK without a local entity. UK employment law 2026, PAYE payroll, National Insurance, workplace pensions, right to work, Skilled Worker visa support. Onboard in 2–3 days. Book a demo.
keywords: hire employees in UK without entity

faqs.title: UK EOR FAQs
faqs.subtitle: Quick answers on cost, timeline, legal risks, and contracts for Employer of Record in the United Kingdom.

items.question: How much does UK EOR cost?
items.answer: UK EOR pricing typically includes a monthly management fee per employee plus gross salary, employer National Insurance, workplace pension contributions (auto-enrolment where applicable), apprenticeship levy if relevant, and employer costs. Income tax and employee NI are deducted via PAYE. At Jackson & Frank we offer transparent pricing. Book a demo for a custom quote.

items.question: How fast can I hire someone in the UK with EOR?
items.answer: With Jackson & Frank UK EOR, many hires complete onboarding in 2–3 business days once contracts and right-to-work evidence are in place. No UK limited company is required on your side, avoiding incorporation delay.

items.question: What are the legal risks of hiring in the UK without an entity?
items.answer: With a compliant UK EOR, the EOR is the employer for tax, employment law, and PAYE purposes. That reduces misclassification, illegal working, and PAYE/RTI failure risk. Use a provider experienced with HMRC rules and UK employment rights.

items.question: What employment contract does UK EOR use?
items.answer: Employees receive a UK-compliant contract of employment or statement of particulars meeting Employment Rights Act requirements, covering pay, hours, holiday, notice, probation, and other mandatory terms. Jackson & Frank issues employment from our UK structure.

items.question: Can you support Skilled Worker visa sponsorship?
items.answer: Where Jackson & Frank holds a sponsor licence, we can support Skilled Worker routes and Certificate of Sponsorship in line with Home Office rules. Eligibility depends on role, salary, and skill level. Ask us for current sponsorship capability.
